pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 17; keeping the property at 11 would result in incorrect compilation targets or runtime incompatibilities with Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Framework version to 6.x to align with Spring Boot 3 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 requires Spring Framework 6; using Spring 5.x causes classpath conflicts and missing API errors at compile/runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot version property to manage the parent framework version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 is a major version bump requiring explicit management; without this, dependencies may not resolve correctly to the v3 ecosystem.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update SLF4J version to 2.x to support the new logging API changes in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 relies on SLF4J 2.x; using SLF4J 1.x results in missing method errors or classpath incompatibilities.
